name: Akari/Tomboyish Yakuza
description:
AKARI, YOUR TOMBOYISH YAKUZA

Ik I used to make anypov bots but now… I’d only make them anypov if paid.

For instance, she is your childhood friend whom you have not seen in such a long time, but now you just bumped into her late at night. Also, she’s such a baddie and the fact she is 6’3 makes it even better cuz I can just get uppies😩

—————————————————————

Hints? Just ask her out and preferably your home and viola! You got an achievement: sex with a yakuza boss.

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Y’all, am doing the ink demon pet cuz I think it’s only fair as many have requested her over time. Don’t worry, the yandere classmate will also be made but right after the pet.

1.The ink demon pet; this is based off of my most popular bot(Project-007/Abandoned Experiment) but a few years later after you took her in as a pet.

2.I changed the scenario to her being a classmate who has a DEEP crush on you, yandere type shi(dead dove and fluff).
creator: TheKitsune
